signals.title: State Puppet Theatre Weekend Performances
signals.when_text: Saturday and Sunday, July 4-5, 2026, at 10:30 and 11:45
signals.reason: Specifically designed for young children, these short, engaging puppet shows are held at very convenient morning times for families.
signals.note: Verified as a real, family-friendly venue in Plovdiv with regular weekend performances suitable for a 4-year-old.

signals.title: Craft School Plovdiv Workshops
signals.reason: These hands-on artisan and craft workshops offer a fun, sensory-rich creative experience for a young child with parental guidance.
signals.note: Verified as a real entity in Plovdiv hosting workshops suitable for children.

signals.title: PhillGood Festival at the Rowing Canal
signals.reason: A spacious outdoor music festival where kids under 10 enter for free, letting parents enjoy the vibe in a flat, stroller-friendly park setting.
signals.note: Verified as a recurring family-friendly event at the Rowing Canal in Plovdiv.

signals.title: Day Trip to Bachkovo Monastery
signals.reason: A highly accessible, beautiful mountain monastery with short walking paths, river views, and local stalls, making for a perfect half-day family trip.
signals.note: Verified as a real, highly accessible mountain monastery about 40 minutes from Plovdiv.

signals.title: Explore the Ancient Theatre of Philippopolis
signals.reason: A spectacular historical site in the heart of the Old Town, offering an easy and impressive stroll without needing to book an event.
signals.note: Verified as a central, family-accessible historical site in Plovdiv Old Town.
